sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Applications 179 to 182 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 01, 04, 25 & 27. 2. For orders on CMA 1533/2024 3. For orders on CMA 1534/2024. 4. For hearing of Main Case. 16.12.2025 Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Prima facie, these references are time barred by 47 days as demonstrated from office not. No application seeking for delay to be condoned has been filed and no rationale has been articulated to justify the delay. The delay is admitted and there is no application filed for condonation of such delay. In view hereof, these reference are dismissed being time barred. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office to place a copy hereof in the connected matters. Judge Judge M. Khan
